name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
description: Common Paper's mutual NDA standard terms, allowing two parties to exchange confidential information for a stated purpose while protecting it under agreed confidentiality obligations.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
description: Cover page used with the Mutual NDA Standard Terms to define the purpose, effective date, term, and governing law for a specific mutual NDA between two parties.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering access and use, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for giving an early-access partner use of a product in exchange for structured feedback to help develop and improve the product.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard SLA, designed for use alongside the Cloud Service Agreement, covering uptime targets, support response times, and service credit remedies.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement governing the provision of professional services and statements of work, covering deliverables, intellectual property, payment, warranties, and liability.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard DPA governing the processing of personal data between a provider and customer, including GDPR/UK GDPR international transfer mechanisms, subprocessors, and security incident response.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for licensing on-premises or client-side software, covering license grants, restrictions, updates, warranties, liability, and indemnification.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for business partnerships involving mutual obligations, trademark licensing, and co-marketing activities between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard short-term trial or evaluation agreement that lets a prospective customer test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard HIPAA business associate agreement governing the use and protection of protected health information (PHI) between a covered entity and a business associate.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper's standard addendum supplementing a Product agreement to govern the use of AI services, including input/output ownership, model training rights, and AI-specific disclaimers.
